name: Chicken Invaders 1
short_description: Save Earth from an invasion of intergalactic chickens! Finger-blistering arcade shooting action for one or two players.
detailed_description:
Save Earth from an invasion of intergalactic chickens!

Sometime in the near future, Earth is invaded by chickens from another galaxy, bent on revenge against the human race for oppressing earth chickens! Take the world's fate in your hands as you repel the poultry invasion.

The Saga Begins

This is where it all started, way back in 1999. The humble beginnings of the most successful chicken game ever. A lot of things may have changed since then, but the ancestral clash of man vs chicken still rages on to this very day. You've always been there, in the front line, right in the thick of action. And you've always emerged victorious.

This is the definitive version of the beginning of the Chicken Invaders saga, made available for the first time ever. A rare opportunity to be a part of gaming history. Save the world today!

What you get

This complete "Chicken Invaders 1" package includes the original Chicken Invaders (1999), Chicken Invaders Remastered (2023), and Chicken Invaders Episode 1 (2025).

New features in Episode 1:

  • Remastered graphics. Now in glorious Full HD 1920x1080 (16:9). Each wave, cutscene, and menu has been individually reviewed and tweaked to account for the new aspect ratio and screen dimensions.

  • Improved weapons. The weapon roster has been reworked and re-balanced. This is the cumulative result of a large player community effort to make all weapons equally effective and fun to use.

  • New engine. More display options, more visual effects, better customization for controls, plays nicer with recent versions of Windows.

  • More languages. This is the result of another player community effort to translate the game to their native language. This project is still ongoing, so expect to see improved translations (or even new languages) over the coming updates.

  • Built-in seasonal content. Your progress (career stats, unlockables, mission progress) is now unified across all seasons.

A slew of exciting features have also been back-ported from Chicken Invaders Universe and made available in Episode 1:

  • New weapons

  • New special weapons

  • Boosters

  • 6 skill levels

  • Custom cuisines

  • Hot, frozen, electric, massive, and darkness environments

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Greek, Hungarian, Korean, Polish, Romanian, Russian, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese, Hebrew, Persian, Slovak
